title: Best iphone photo lenses | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best iphone photo lenses. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: Moment T-Series Lens Kit (Wide, Tele, Anamorphic options)
cons: Requires Moment case or mount for best fit
Some compatibility issues with newest iPhone periscope/tele lenses

recommendations.product_name: SANDMARC Photography Lens Kit / 58mm Telephoto (Sandmarc Tele 2x & 6x options)
pros: Available kits for wide, macro, and tele needs
cons: Some chromatic aberration on edges noted in tests
Clip/case mounting may be needed for best results
Mixed reports on advantage over native iPhone zoom for newest models

pros: Includes LED fill light in some bundles

cons: Not as sharp as premium glass (Moment/Sandmarc)
